title: Zamorak godsword
wikitext:
{{External|rs}} {{Redirect2|Zgs|the [[Zaros]]ian variant of the godsword|Ancient godsword}} {{Infobox Item |name = Zamorak godsword |image = [[File:Zamorak godsword.png]] |release = [[17 October]] [[2013]] |update = The God Wars Dungeon has been uncovered! |aka = ZGS |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Dismantle, Drop |examine = A terrifying, heavy sword. |value = 1250000 |weight = 10.000 |exchange = Yes |id = 11808 |leagueRegion = Asgarnia }} [[File:Zamorak godsword detail.png|left|140px]] The '''Zamorak godsword''' is one of the five variants of the [[Godsword]] that was fought over during the [[God Wars]]. It is created by attaching a [[Zamorak hilt]], obtained from [[K'ril Tsutsaroth]], to a completed [[godsword blade]]. Like all godsword variants, it requires 75 [[Attack]] to wield. Players can attach a [[Zamorak godsword ornament kit]], obtained from [[master clue scroll]]s, to cosmetically enhance the godsword, creating a [[Zamorak godsword (or)]]. This only alters its appearance, and gives no stat enhancements. It also becomes untradeable, returning both the godsword and the ornament kit when dismantled. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = 0 |aslash = +132 |acrush = +80 |amagic = 0 |arange = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = +132 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = +8 |slot = 2h |speed = 6 |attackrange = 1 |combatstyle = 2h Sword |image = [[File:Zamorak godsword equipped.png|120px]] |altimage = [[File:Zamorak godsword equipped female.png|140px]] }} {{CombatStyles|2h Sword|speed=6|attackrange=1}} ==Special attack== [[File:Ice Cleave.gif|thumb|250px|A player uses ''Ice Cleave'', the Zamorak godsword's special attack.]] The Zamorak godsword has a [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Ice Cleave'', which consumes 50% of the player's special attack energy. It doubles the player's accuracy (slash or crush roll) and increases their max hit by 10%. In addition, it freezes the target in place for 19.2 seconds (32 [[tick]]s); the same duration as [[Ice Barrage]]. The sword's special attack must produce a [[successful hit]] in order to have the freezing effect, and it rolls against the opponent's slash defence. [[Protect from Melee]] only gives a damage reduction of 40% and does not affect the freeze. While its unique special attack may provide less utility than all other Godswords for the majority of situational uses, (e.g. it doesn't restore depleted stats, deplete opponent's stats, or deal any additional maximum damage relative to the other godswords), it is useful in numerous niche situations. It is very popular in the [[Castle Wars]] [[minigame]] when used to freeze flag-bearers, as such players generally wear equipment with high [[Magic defence]] bonus, such as [[black d'hide armour|black dragonhide]], [[Karil's leathertop]], and/or [[Armadyl armour]] in order to more easily defend against enemy mages casting [[Ancient Magicks]] (or [[Snare]]/[[Entangle]] with the standard spellbook). The use of this common strategy of possessing high magic defence bonus equipment, coupled with the game's particular [[magic defence]]-determining mechanics (that ultimately benefit accounts with higher levels in magic than defence), reliably renders magic-based freezing methods consistently ineffective. The Zamorak godsword's melee-based [[Special attacks|special attack]] is often used to undermine this tactic. In the [[Wilderness]], it can also be used to freeze an enemy in place in order to attack from a distance, escape, or provide a more diversified (and therefore reliable) freezing strategy for clans; a useful tactic in [[Single-way combat]] is logging out while standing under a recently frozen enemy, as they will not unfreeze in time to retaliate unless they bring [[adamant seeds|adamant]] or [[mithril seeds]]. The Zamorak godsword has also found use in [[monster killing|player-vs-monster]] situations. It is a popular weapon when fighting the [[Muttadile]]s, as it usually stops them from being able to heal from the [[meat tree]]. It can also be used during the [[Barrows]] minigame to freeze the melee-using brothers in place, particularly [[Dharok the Wretched]]. The special attack [[animation]]'s colours can be changed to gold, which costs 75 [[Last Man Standing]] points. Once unlocked, the gold trim can be toggled at [[Justine's stuff for the Last Shopper Standing]] whenever the player desires. ==Creation== {{Recipe |members = Yes |ticks = 0 |mat1 = Godsword blade Poll 37: Skillcape Perks |change = The special attack cost has been reduced to 50%, down from 60%. }} {{Subject changes |date = 19 March 2015 |update = Boss Pets, Sets, Chat & More |poll = Old School Content Poll 30: Near Miss Poll |change = The accurate attack style of the Godswords has been adjusted to use slash rather than crush. As the slash attack bonus on Godswords has always been higher than the crush bonus, having the accurate attack style of the weapons use slash rather than crush means that the accurate attack style takes advantage of the best offensive bonus of the weapon. }} {{Subject changes |date = 7 November 2013 |update = POH updates & weapon tweaks |poll = Old School feature poll 12: Player-designed content |change = *The Accurate combat mode of godswords has been changed from 'Stab' to 'Crush', since godswords have no stab-attack bonus * Godswords will now pop up a confirmation box when you try to dismantle them }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Zamorak godsword detail.png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Zamorak godsword (v1) detail.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Zamorak godsword.png|center]] |[[File:Zamorak godsword v1.png|center]] |- |17 October 2013 – 6 July 2016
